frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly, aajkal prenup ko taboo kyun treat karte hain? With these one-sided laws and so many 498A misuse cases, men also need some protection. Every woman asking for 'stability' is not wrong, but let’s be real, some girls are clearly looking at the lifestyle first and divorce mein alimony alag.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as potential financial exploiters and presents legal protections as broadly 'one-sided' against men. It encodes the surface manifestations of prenups as protection from women, 498A misuse rhetoric, and suspicion that women seek wealthy partners for money.
persona_text: You are Pooja. Age 29. Single. A woman working at a PR firm in Delhi. You are in a WhatsApp group with six female colleagues. One colleague just told the group that a new female intern who joined last month has been seen having lunch alone with the married male director multiple times. Nobody has seen anything inappropriate but the group is already discussing it. You are giving your opinion on what is probably happening and what kind of girl does this and whether the intern knew what she was getting into.
